Precondition: The right arm can reach the front face of box_red_1 and the area in front of the green box is free of obstacles to receive the red box when it is pushed.
Postcondition: box_red_1 is slid forward onto the clear tabletop surface and is no longer on top of box_green_1, leaving the green box fully exposed.

Precondition: box_green_1 is unobstructed on both sides; both arms can approach its left and right faces without interference from box_red_1 or other objects.
Postcondition: The robot securely holds box_green_1 between its two end-effectors, lifting it slightly off the tabletop.
